description_long: This object is a white Dacia Duster SUV, featuring a modern, compact body with four passenger doors and a rear hatch. The vehicle has a robust, utilitarian design with black trim accents along the windows and lower body, and a prominent front grille displaying the Dacia badge. The doors, hood, and rear hatch are all open, revealing interior seating, dashboard, and engine compartment details. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys, and the SUV sits on a metallic, hexagonal platform with a hazard-striped border. The rear of the vehicle displays the Duster nameplate, and the overall build suggests a practical, urban-friendly vehicle. The exterior is primarily white with black and chrome highlights, and the interior appears to be upholstered in dark materials.
description: A white Dacia Duster SUV with open doors, hood, and rear hatch, showcasing its interior and engine. The vehicle features black trim, alloy wheels, and a compact, urban-ready design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing two Dacia Duster SUVs, both with rear hatches open and all side doors open, revealing the trunk and interior.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open front and rear doors, as well as the open hood and rear hatch, exposing the engine and cargo area.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the Dacia grille, headlights, open hood with visible engine, and open side doors.
description_view_3: Right side view with all doors and the rear hatch open, providing a clear look at the interior and engine compartment.
attribute_wheel_design: five double-spoke alloy wheels with a silver finish
